title: epidendrum rhodochilum
intro: Epidendrum rhodochilum, also known as the "rod-orchid," is a type of orchid native to Central and South America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Epidendrum rhodochilum include reducing inflammation and fighting off infections, as well as supporting the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
